data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm that the waiting room feature is enabled by default for the video conferencing integration. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the default state of the waiting room feature, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The linked use case mentions the waiting room but does not provide concrete evidence that it is enabled by default, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the waiting room is enabled by default.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify waiting room default setting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if 'waitingRoomEnabled' is set to true.
